{{Infobox character
| name = Maten sisters
| appears_in = Cradle
| introduced = [[Wintersteel (novel)|Wintersteel]]
}}

== Wintersteel ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">3</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|The [[Maten sisters]] use [[Ruler techniques]] to strip logs.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c13">''Wintersteel'', chapter 13</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|The [[Maten sisters]] are members of [[Lindon]]'s team who do not talk much to anyone but each other.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c14">''Wintersteel'', chapter 14</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|The [[Maten sisters]] avoided capture and are safe.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c28">''Wintersteel'', chapter 28</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Wintersteel]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle characters]]
